hole_ref: c6/c7 H7 — WMM 2025 missing inline URL
summary: PATCH-323-C in EXP-323 (verification batch 7): WIN-028 detail_evidence — adds inline URL anchor https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/products/world-magnetic-model to the WMM 2025 citation. Closes the c5 carry-forward 'citations_unchecked' concern. Pure citation anchor, zero content change.
